meaning: n.<<罗马书>>(<<圣经·新约>>中的一卷)
examples: Lettuce was grown by the ancient Romans.
The valley was originally bridged by the Romans.
They had five centuries of domination by the Romans.
While some Romans retreat to the countryside on Easter, the city remains festive and crowded.
The Romans, who later controlled this region, were also partial to a drop of wine.
